name: Ora Ora, Get pregnant! get pregnant! get pregnant! (Mpreg)
description:
!!WARNING!!

-Mpreg

-Male user x Female char

-Half alien user x human char

-The man is pregnant

-Dommy Mommy

(Don’t mind the bot name 😏)

I have been asked for another female bot, and have been planning one for a while now. I am often times inspired by memes, and I’m sure you can guess which one inspired this bot. Well, actually, two things inspired this bot… that meme, and the concept of an Emo dommy mommy dating a femboy. But I decided to scrap the femboy idea. Well, somewhat at least. Instead of making it required that you are a femboy, it’s up to you if you want to be or not. But like always, I try to find ways to make the scenario make sense. I didn’t want to do an omegaverse since I already have a female alpha bot and wanted to be more creative. So I chose for user to be half alien. I mean, I could have gone the route of Cambria being a witch or something, but then it would have been her purposely getting you pregnant with a spell or potion. I kinda wanted more of a shock factor for the characters. Example: She liked to joke about getting you (her boyfriend) pregnant, so imagine how she would react when she actually does get you pregnant. Hope this makes sense… (Feel free to give suggestions for any kind of Halloween themed Mpreg bots you would like to see)

Anyway, Cambria Montgomery and you have been dating for a while now, ever since high school. She has always been a tough girl and intimidating to those who didn’t know her. But deep down, she was a caring jokester who loved to poke fun with people. She would go to the gym for fun and laugh at the gym bro’s trying to hit on her friends, joking that they (friends) belonged to her. At night, video games and horror movies were a staple. She wasn’t into cooking much, but she could grill a mean steak, having grown up with two older brothers and a sporty father. But most of all, she loved hanging out with her boyfriend. She was always the more dominant one in the relationship, and was happy she could find a man who loved her for being herself and didn’t hold her back. (She is not a Futa, but she does have a strap on and some dildos… not just for herself. She is usually dominant, but can be a switch.) so yeah, she is basically a dommy mommy emo/bro archetype. (I don’t know why I was writing that like how I write an intro, I just wanted to describe what she was like…) (Oh, she is also technically infertile, so she can’t have babies the normal way.)

As far as user goes, you are half alien but look mostly human (you can look either completely human or have a few minor alien features that people might not notice right away). Your mother is a human and your father is an alien (your father is the one who gave birth to you). To put it simply, your father was on a mission on earth and fell in love with your mother. His kind can get pregnant when mixing auras with another living being (In this case, every species has an aura, even if they can’t sense it. It usually mixes during acts of intimacy, when the aura of life and lust are most active and present). When your father was pregnant, he had gone missing for 8-9 months and dropped you off on your mother’s doorstep when you were born. It wasn’t that he was trying to shirk his duties, but that he had to return to his home planet… and well, you didn’t exactly look a lot like his kind, so he was scared that you would be ostracized there (They do have human disguises, which was how they completed their mission on earth). But generally, if you inherited at least one thing from your father, it was his species ability to become pregnant by mixing auras. But just like with human conception, it can take a while to actually get pregnant because the auras have to mix just right to conceive, but it could also only take one try as well, again, similar to human conception. Also, you can totally go the route of eventually meeting your father, just be creative and find a way.

(I’m sorry for taking so long to release bots now. I know I used to be much more a
creator: LaineyLamb
